title: Create the Gapminder dataset
text:
# Import necessary libraries
import pandas as pd
from gapminder import gapminder

# Rename 'lifeExp' to 'life_expectancy' and 'gdpPercap' to 'gdp_per_capita'
gapminder = gapminder.rename(columns={'lifeExp': 'life_expectancy',
                                      'pop': 'population_millions', 
                                      'gdpPercap': 'gdp_per_capita'})

# Convert population to millions
gapminder['population_millions'] = gapminder['population_millions'] / 1_000_000

# Create a new pandas DataFrame from the modified gapminder data
gapminder_df = pd.DataFrame(gapminder)

# Save the DataFrame as a CSV file
gapminder_df.to_csv('gapminder.csv', index=False)

# Print the first 3 rows of the DataFrame
print(gapminder_df.head(3))

title: Gapminder Project Home
text:
The Gapminder Dataset tracks varying historical trends in health and wealth measures for 142 countries between the years of 1952 and 2007.

Analysis Pages:

Life Expectancy and GDP per Capita
Life Expectancy and Population
Country Analysis

title: Country Analysis: Mexico
text:
Tracking changes in life expectancy, GDP per Capita, and population size for Mexico over time

import pandas as pd
import matplotlib.pyplot as plt

df = pd.read_csv('gapminder.csv')
mexico = df[df['country'] == 'Mexico']

plt.plot(mexico['year'], mexico['life_expectancy'], label="Life Expectancy")
plt.plot(mexico['year'], mexico['gdp_per_capita'] / 100, label="GDP/100") # Scaled for visibility
plt.legend()
plt.show()

title: Life Expectancy and GDP per Capita
text:
This analysis will explore the correlation between a country’s life expectancy and their GDP per Capita.

import pandas as pd
import matplotlib.pyplot as plt

df = pd.read_csv('gapminder.csv')
plt.scatter(df['gdp_per_capita'], df['life_expectancy'], alpha=0.5)
plt.title("GDP vs Life Expectancy")
plt.xlabel("GDP per Capita")
plt.ylabel("Life Expectancy")
plt.show()

title: Life Expectancy and Population
text:
We are looking to examine if the size of a country’s population has any sort of effect on Life Expectancy

import pandas as pd
import matplotlib.pyplot as plt

df = pd.read_csv('gapminder.csv')
plt.scatter(df['population_millions'], df['life_expectancy'], color='red')
plt.title("Population vs Life Expectancy")
plt.xlabel("Population (Millions)")
plt.ylabel("Life Expectancy")
plt.show()
